hero.eyebrow: You Didn't Start a Business to Be an Admin Worker
hero.headline: Stop doing admin work.
hero.subheadline: One platform. One assistant. Website, CRM, email, WhatsApp, automations — all managed by your own AI agent. Stop juggling tools. Start growing.

problem.heading: You're told you have two choices
problem.body: Neither of them work for business owners who value their time.
problem.diySubtitle: Wix, Shopify, WordPress, HubSpot free tier...
diyItems: Hours spent tinkering instead of running your business
Limited capabilities that break when you need them
problem.diyNote: Cheap upfront, but you become your own tech department.
problem.enterpriseNote: Expensive, complex, and you still have to manage it all.
problem.closing: Both options rob you of the one thing you can't get back: your time.

solution.heading: Not a tool. Not a platform.
solution.body: The Upgrade Shop is your dedicated digital infrastructure partner. We handle everything — professionally — so you can focus on what you do best.
checklist: One unified system instead of 7+ platforms
Professional quality without the agency price tag
Always-on support via Max, our AI partner
solution.card1Body: Real developers create your infrastructure professionally. No DIY, no templates.
solution.card2Body: Max, our AI, handles day-to-day. Our team ensures quality. You just describe what you need.
solution.card3Body: Request features and we build them. Free. Your infrastructure grows with your business.
solution.quote: You focus on what you do best. We handle everything else.

websiteCallout.heading: Your website,

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.body: Getting started is simple. Getting results is even simpler.

step1.title: Choose what you need
step1.body: Start with one module or get everything. Pick what makes sense for your business right now.

step2.title: We set it up
step2.body: Real developers build your infrastructure professionally. No DIY, no templates, no guesswork.

step3.title: You run your business
step3.body: Max and our team handle the rest. Updates, changes, improvements — just describe what you need.

pricingPreview.heading: Transparent, modular pricing.
pricingPreview.headingGold: Pay only for what you need.
pricingPreview.body: Two plans: Starter ($170/mo) and Ecommerce ($260/mo). Both include your AI-built website, CRM, email, automations, and personal AI agent. Add modules as you grow.

aiAgentBanner.body: Manages your platform, handles updates, and serves your customers 24/7.

pricingPreview.note: Professional Website builds, AI Actions packages, Founder Launch setup, and website add-ons on the pricing page.

faq.heading: Common questions
faq.body: Can't find what you're looking for? We're always here to help.
faq.supportNote: Still have questions? Chat with us anytime.

items.q: How is this different from Wix or Squarespace?
items.a: With Wix or Squarespace, you're doing the work yourself — picking templates, editing layouts, learning the platform. With The Upgrade Shop, we build everything for you professionally. You describe what you need, and real developers create it. You never touch an editor.

items.q: What if I need something custom?
items.a: That's exactly what we're built for. When you request a feature for a module you're subscribed to, we build it. For free. Your subscription doesn't just maintain — it improves based on your specific needs.

items.q: Can I start small and add more later?
items.a: Absolutely. Start with just what you need — maybe just a website, or just CRM. Add more modules as your business grows. Everything works together seamlessly, so there's no penalty for starting small.

items.q: What does "Max handles it" actually mean?
items.a: Max is our AI partner who helps manage your day-to-day updates and requests. Need a text change on your website? Tell Max. Need a new email campaign? Tell Max. For anything that needs human expertise, Max routes it to our development team. You always have a responsive partner, 24/7.

items.q: How long does it take to get started?
items.a: Most clients are up and running within days, not weeks. We handle all the technical setup, content migration, and configuration. You just provide the direction.

items.q: What if I want to cancel?
items.a: No long-term contracts. Cancel anytime. Your data is always yours — we'll help you export everything if you ever decide to leave. We're confident you won't want to, but the door is never locked.

finalCta.heading: Ready to focus on what matters?
finalCta.body: Your digital infrastructure shouldn't be a project you manage. Let us handle it so you can focus on your craft.
